cookies.body: We use analytics cookies to understand how visitors experience the estate. Nothing is tracked before you agree.
cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.intro: VERDE Ulaşlı uses a minimal analytics setup to understand how visitors use the website. You can accept or reject this at any time.
cookies.whatBody: PostHog — a privacy-respecting analytics tool hosted in the EU. It records page views and anonymous interactions, with IP anonymisation enabled.
cookies.choiceBody: Nothing is recorded before you click Accept. If you reject, no analytics cookies or identifiers are created. You can change your choice by clearing your browser storage.
cookies.contact: For any data-protection question, write to privacy@verde-ulasli.com.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This notice explains how VERDE Ulaşlı handles personal data. We collect as little as possible and never sell it.
privacy.dataBody: Booking enquiries you send via the contact form or WhatsApp link — stored only in your email provider's inbox. Anonymous analytics — only if you accept cookies. No payment data is processed on this site.
privacy.rightsBody: Under GDPR, UK-DPA and KVKK you may request access, correction, deletion, or portability of your data at any time.
privacy.contact: Controller: VERDE Ulaşlı · Ulaşlı, Kocaeli, Turkey · privacy@verde-ulasli.com

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: By using verde-ulasli.com you agree to the following terms. Specific booking conditions will be confirmed in writing before any reservation becomes binding.
terms.bookBody: The form and WhatsApp flow are for enquiries only. A reservation is confirmed only after written agreement and receipt of the deposit by bank transfer.
terms.cancelBody: Cancellations more than 14 days before arrival receive a full refund of the deposit. Within 14 days the deposit is retained. Force-majeure situations are handled case by case.
terms.lawBody: These terms are governed by the law of the Republic of Turkey. Any dispute falls under the jurisdiction of the courts of Kocaeli.

impressum.title: Legal notice / Impressum
impressum.responsibleBody: VERDE Ulaşlı — operated by the founding partners. Ulaşlı, Kocaeli, Türkiye.
impressum.contentBody: All renders, photographs, text and the VERDE Ulaşlı brand are © VERDE Ulaşlı. Reproduction without written consent is prohibited.
impressum.hostingBody: Cloudflare Pages (Cloudflare, Inc., 101 Townsend Street, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA).

home.title: VERDE
home.subtitle: Turkey's first agro-luxury estate. Two villas, one living land.
home.agroTitle: The land doesn't wait for you — it lives
home.agroBody: 5,500 m² of living earth. Organic gardens, a henhouse that greets the morning, fruit trees that mark the seasons. This is not a villa with a garden. This is a garden that happens to have a villa.
home.alyaDesc: The horizon belongs to you here
home.zehraDesc: Hidden among the olives, open to the sky
home.expBody: The menu writes itself from the garden. The fire starts where the sun ends. Every moment here is designed to be felt, not just seen.
home.exp1d: Collect eggs at dawn, breakfast made from what you gathered
home.exp2d: Pick from the garden, your chef turns it into dinner
home.exp3d: Stories around the flames under a canopy of stars
home.exp4d: Night sauna, cold plunge, the Milky Way overhead
home.locTitle: Far from the world, close to everything
home.closingBody: When the mist lifts, the sea appears. When the sun sets, the fire begins. All that's missing is you.

story.heroSub: Some places find you before you find them.
story.s1Body: We weren't looking for a business opportunity. We were looking for a place where mornings smell different. Where the mist rolls in at dawn and lifts to reveal the Marmara. Where the soil is dark and willing. We found Ulaşlı — or perhaps it found us.
story.s2Body: Luxury is not marble lobbies and gold taps. Luxury is waking up to silence. It's eating tomatoes that taste like the word used to mean. It's a fire that no one asked you to light, but somehow it's already burning when you step outside.
story.s3Title: Agro-luxury: a new word for an old idea
story.s3Body: Our grandparents lived this way — close to the land, fed by the seasons. We simply wrapped it in modern architecture, an infinity pool, and a private chef. The hens don't know they're part of a luxury concept. They just lay eggs every morning.
story.s4Body: Verde is Italian for green. Green is the colour of paradise in Islamic tradition, the language of Italian elegance, and the essence of the land that hosts you. One word, understood differently by everyone who hears it — and loved by all of them.
story.s5Body: ALYA faces the sea — bold, panoramic, unapologetic. ZEHRA hides among the olives — intimate, grounded, secret. Two characters sharing one 5,500m² estate, one garden, one philosophy: the land is not a backdrop. The land is the host.
story.s6Body: Ulaşlı is not new. Caravans passed through these mountains in the medieval age. Roman burial stones still sleep beneath the grass. On one side of the ridge sits İznik — where empires held councils and artisans fired cobalt into tiles. On the other, the Gulf of Marmara stretches toward Istanbul. This land has been a crossroads for centuries. We simply added a front door.
story.s7Body: In Italian, verde means green. In Arabic, وردة (warda) means rose — the word appears in the Quran when the sky splits open like a crimson flower. In the language of gardens, green is what remains when everything else falls away. We chose a name that crosses borders the way colour does: without asking permission.
story.s8Title: The soil feeds, the hands follow
story.s8Body: There is a kitchen garden where tomatoes ripen on the vine, peppers grow crooked and honest, and pomegranate trees hold fruit like lanterns. A henhouse delivers eggs still warm each morning. Children plant seeds and return the next visit to find their basil grown tall. Jams are made in season. Olive oil is pressed nearby. The table is set by the land itself.
story.s9Body: Spring arrives with birdsong and blossoms. Summer lifts the canopy and fills the pool with light. Autumn wraps the hills in mist and delivers the harvest. Winter strips everything bare, leaving only firelight and snow. The altitude here holds a different quiet for each month. Some mornings feel like the foothills of the Alps. Others feel like nowhere at all.
story.s10Title: Close to everything, hidden from all
story.s10Body: Fine dining: twenty minutes. Kartepe ski resort: one hour. Uludağ: two hours. Black Sea coves: one hour in summer. Clean Marmara bays: thirty minutes. Sabiha Gökçen Airport: fifty minutes. The heart of Istanbul: seventy minutes. Bursa: seventy minutes. Verde sits at the centre of a wheel whose spokes reach mountains, coastlines and ancient cities. Yet from inside the estate, none of it is visible. Only green. Only quiet.
story.closingQuote: We didn't build a hotel. We built a place we wanted to live in — and then decided to share it.
story.catalogueDesc: Download our luxury catalogue detailing the story, spaces and experiences of Verde Ulaşlı.

investor.overviewBody: VERDE ULAŞLI is Turkey's first agro-luxury villa estate, located in Ulaşlı, Kocaeli. Two twin villas on 5,500 m² of living land — organic gardens, a henhouse, fruit trees, infinity pool, sauna, fire pit, and 10 unique experience programmes.
investor.brandBody: Italian for "green". The colour of paradise in Islamic tradition, the language of Italian elegance, and the essence of the land that hosts you. Selected from 47 candidates through a multi-criteria analysis including Gulf customer psychology.
investor.valueVoice: Sensory, mysterious, elegant — the place speaks, not "you"
investor.valuePillars: Land, Design, Experience, Privacy, Personal Touch

experience.heroSub: Every moment here is designed to be felt, not just seen.
experience.emptyFilter: No experiences match this season yet. Try another.
experience.springDesc: The garden awakens. First flowers, planting days, new beginnings.
experience.summerDesc: Golden hour never ends. Infinity pool, open-air cinema, long evenings.
experience.autumnDesc: The harvest arrives. Mist mornings, fire nights, the land gives back.
experience.winterDesc: The shelter closes in. Fireplace, sauna, snow. 38°C inside, silence outside.
experience.exp1d: The day begins at the henhouse. Eggs still warm, herbs just cut, breakfast made from what you gathered minutes ago. No menu — the garden decides.
experience.exp2d: Walk to the garden with your chef. Pick what's ripe. Return to the kitchen and watch it transform into dinner. Farm-to-table is not a concept here — it's just Tuesday.
experience.exp3d: When the sun drops below the tree line, the fire pit comes alive. Marshmallows, warm drinks, stories that only happen when flames are close and the sky is overhead.
experience.exp4d: Night sauna at 90°C. Step outside, cold air hits. Look up — the Milky Way stretches across the entire sky. No light pollution. No noise. Just heat and stars.
experience.exp5d: Coastal trails, forest paths, hilltop viewpoints. Explore the land beyond the estate on four wheels. Return dusty, grinning, ready for the pool.
experience.exp6d: The pool faces west. At 20:47 in summer, the sun sits exactly on the water line. We call it golden hour. You'll call it the reason you came.
experience.exp7d: Life-size chess pieces on the garden lawn. No timer, no pressure. Just strategy under the trees, with the sea as your backdrop.
experience.exp8d: Children feed the animals, plant seeds, collect eggs. They return muddy, proud, and completely disconnected from screens. Parents watch from the terrace with coffee.
experience.exp9d: A projector, a white sheet, the fire pit nearby. Summer evenings become open-air cinema under the stars. Popcorn included, shoes optional.
experience.exp10d: A private path winds through the estate — pine trees, wildflowers, viewpoints. Morning walks with mist. Evening walks with golden light. The land tells a different story each time.
